# Cipta Interior

Official website of Cipta Interior, a professional design & build interior contractor and custom furniture manufacturer serving domestic (Indonesia-wide) and international clients. Experienced since 2009 in residential (homes, villas, apartments) and commercial (offices, F&B, retail, hotels) spaces.

## Core Information
- **Location**: Headquarters & Workshop at Jl. Taruma Jaya, Setiamulya, Kec. Tarumajaya, Kab. Bekasi, Jawa Barat 17213.
- **Service Scope**: Nationwide (all Indonesian cities: Jakarta, Bandung, Surabaya, Medan, Semarang, Bali, etc.) via remote online design + local installation partners, and international clients (expatriates & exports).
- **Specialty**: Custom kitchen sets, residential design & build, commercial renovation, hotel & hospitality interior.
- **Unique Selling Proposition**: Direct workshop production (no middleman markup), free consultation & initial mock-up, dedicated project manager, and 2-year full warranty.

## Key Pages
- [/](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/): Homepage with core credentials, sameAs links, key project metrics, and client reviews.
- [/about](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/about): 15-year company milestone history since 2009, organizational structured data, and milestones.
- [/services](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/services): Jasa Desain & Kontraktor (Design & Build) details, FAQPage schema for voice search, and pricing catalog.
- [/portofolio](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/portofolio): Interactive portfolio gallery filtered by residential, commercial, restaurant, hotel, and custom furniture.
- [/contact](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/contact): Official contact page, active map coordinates, operating hours, and email/WhatsApp links.
- [/client](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/client): Detailed client testimonials, aggregate review metrics (5/5 rating based on 180+ clients), and partner logos.
- [/blog](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/blog): Directory of static guide articles on pricing, materials, and tropical home layout guidelines.

## Key Resources
- [/blog/harga-kitchen-set-bekasi](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/blog/harga-kitchen-set-bekasi): A detailed kitchen set cost estimation guide.
- [/blog/kitchen-set-minimalis](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/blog/kitchen-set-minimalis): 10 tips for choosing minimal kitchen sets, layout rules, and material guidelines.
- [/blog/desain-interior-residensial](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/blog/desain-interior-residensial): 5 residential interior styles suited for tropical climates in Indonesia.
- [/blog/furnitur-custom-material](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/blog/furnitur-custom-material): Guide to choosing furniture materials (plywood vs MDF, HPL vs duco).
